name: pritunl-connections
title: Pritunl Connections
description: Manage VPN connections from Raycast using Pritunl CLI

commands.name: pritunl
commands.title: Manage VPN Connections
commands.description: Manage VPN connections using Pritunl CLI
commands.subtitle: Pritunl

preferences.name: application
preferences.title: Pritunl Application
preferences.description: Select Pritunl application from the list

preferences.name: timeout
preferences.title: Connection Timeout
preferences.description: Set the timeout for VPN connection attempts in seconds (default: 30)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

author: maxiu
